description: Expanded clustering dataset with anchor-sensitive hard negatives and sparse-anchor recall cases.

articles.headline: Schools in Sderot open late after morning rocket alert
articles.snippet: The municipality delayed classes after alerts near the Gaza border.

articles.headline: Rocket alert heard in Sderot area, classes delayed
articles.snippet: Local officials said schools would start later after the warning siren.

articles.headline: Sirens near Sderot force delayed school opening
articles.snippet: Coverage in Arabic on the same morning alert and education disruption.

articles.headline: Cabinet backs revised state budget after late-night vote
articles.snippet: Finance officials said the coalition approved the updated budget outline.

articles.headline: Coalition clears revised budget framework in overnight session
articles.snippet: Report says ministers voted after negotiations over spending changes.

articles.headline: Israeli cabinet approves updated budget package
articles.snippet: English coverage of the same budget decision and coalition compromises.

articles.headline: Bus overturns on Highway 6, several passengers injured
articles.snippet: Rescue teams treated multiple injuries after an early-morning crash.

articles.headline: Highway 6 bus crash sends passengers to hospital
articles.snippet: Police closed lanes while medics evacuated the injured.

articles.headline: Several hurt after bus accident on Route 6
articles.snippet: A similar incident report covering the same crash and injury count.

articles.headline: Organizers call for a Jerusalem protest next week
articles.snippet: Advance notice about a planned demonstration, not a completed event.

articles.headline: Activists announce a separate Tel Aviv protest for Monday
articles.snippet: Another protest announcement with similar political framing but different city and date.

articles.headline: Single-source rumor claims minister may resign

articles.headline: Two wounded after stabbing in Ramat Gan

articles.headline: Initial report: two wounded in a stabbing attack
